goal: Build a mesh-collision-optimization fixture: import a complex Cube mesh, diagnose its collision quality with check_collision_mesh, compute a convex-hull approximation via compute_convex_hull (with hull export for viewport inspection), simplify a second mesh with simplify_collision, then fix a deliberately broken mesh with fix_collision_mesh and verify repair with check_collision_mesh. Exercises the full mesh-optimization pipeline — first canonical in the library to cover this tool chain.
thoughts: Pattern gap: no existing canonical exercises the mesh-optimization pipeline. check_collision_mesh + compute_convex_hull + simplify_collision + fix_collision_mesh is a distinct 4-tool chain unused elsewhere in the 112-canonical library.

Scene geometry: three mesh prims — MeshA (simple Cube, good baseline), MeshB (Sphere, target for simplify_collision), MeshC (degenerate mesh created with zero-area triangles, target for fix_collision_mesh).

Workflow: (1) baseline check_collision_mesh on MeshA reports zero issues; (2) compute_convex_hull on MeshA with export_hull_path produces visible hull prim; (3) compute_volume + compute_surface_area confirm hull metrics; (4) simplify_collision on MeshB to convexDecomposition; (5) optimize_collision on MeshB to boundingSphere for comparison; (6) fix_collision_mesh on MeshC (degenerate); (7) check_collision_mesh on MeshC post-fix confirms repair; (8) visualize_collision_mesh on MeshA shows wireframe overlay.
No robot arm needed — mesh-optimization is a pure USD/physics-API workflow.
Function-gate: check_collision_mesh on MeshC post-fix must return zero fatal issues. Hull export prim must exist at /World/MeshA_Hull.
Physics: minimal scene — CPU dynamics, ground plane for completeness.
code:
# -- Ground and lighting ---------------------------------------------------
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=800.0)
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/Ground",
    prim_type="Cube",
    position=[0, 0, -0.5],
    scale=[10, 10, 1],
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# -- Physics scene ----------------------------------------------------------
set_physics_scene_config(
    config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"}
)

# -- MeshA: simple Cube (good baseline mesh) --------------------------------
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/MeshA",
    prim_type="Cube",
    position=[0.0, 0.0, 0.5],
    scale=[0.3, 0.3, 0.3],
)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/MeshA", schema_name=api)

# -- MeshB: Sphere (target for collision simplification) --------------------
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/MeshB",
    prim_type="Sphere",
    position=[0.8, 0.0, 0.5],
)
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/MeshB", attr_name="radius", value=0.2)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/MeshB", schema_name=api)

# -- MeshC: Cube with poor collision (fix target) ---------------------------
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/MeshC",
    prim_type="Cube",
    position=[-0.8, 0.0, 0.5],
    scale=[0.25, 0.25, 0.001],
)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/MeshC", schema_name=api)
# Zero out one scale axis to create near-degenerate geometry
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/MeshC", attr_name="xformOp:scale", value=[0.25, 0.25, 0.0005])

# -- Step 1: Baseline collision health check on MeshA ----------------------
check_collision_mesh(prim_path="/World/MeshA")

# -- Step 2: Compute convex hull on MeshA, export visible hull prim ---------
compute_convex_hull(
    prim_path="/World/MeshA",
    export_hull_path="/World/MeshA_Hull",
)

# -- Step 3: Measure MeshA geometry ----------------------------------------
compute_volume(prim_path="/World/MeshA")
compute_surface_area(prim_path="/World/MeshA")

# -- Step 4: Simplify MeshB collision to convex decomposition ---------------
simplify_collision(
    prim_path="/World/MeshB",
    approximation="convexDecomposition",
)

# -- Step 5: Switch MeshB to bounding-sphere for performance comparison -----
optimize_collision(
    prim_path="/World/MeshB",
    approximation="boundingSphere",
)

# -- Step 6: Diagnose degenerate MeshC before repair ------------------------
check_collision_mesh(prim_path="/World/MeshC")

# -- Step 7: Auto-repair MeshC (target_triangles=500 for dynamic body) ------
fix_collision_mesh(
    prim_path="/World/MeshC",
    target_triangles=500,
)

# -- Step 8: Confirm MeshC repair: zero fatal issues expected ---------------
check_collision_mesh(prim_path="/World/MeshC")

# -- Step 9: Visualize wireframe collision overlay on MeshA -----------------
visualize_collision_mesh(prim_path="/World/MeshA")
extension_notes: First canonical in the library to exercise the mesh-optimization pipeline. No robot arm. Function-gate: check_collision_mesh on MeshC post-fix returns zero fatal issues; hull export prim /World/MeshA_Hull exists. Degenerate geometry (near-zero scale axis) models real import artifacts.
failure_modes: compute_convex_hull export_hull_path may fail if scipy.spatial not installed in Kit Python env
fix_collision_mesh on a USD Cube (not a raw Mesh) may return 'not a Mesh prim' — use a Mesh import instead if available
optimize_collision after simplify_collision may override approximation silently (last-write wins)
visualize_collision_mesh requires omni.physx.ui extension enabled; may no-op silently if disabled
code_template:
# -- Ground and lighting ---------------------------------------------------
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=800.0)
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/Ground",
    prim_type="Cube",
    position=[0, 0, -0.5],
    scale=[10, 10, 1],
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(
    config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"}
)

# -- MeshA (baseline) -------------------------------------------------------
create_prim(
    prim_path={{mesh_baseline.path}},
    prim_type="Cube",
    position={{mesh_baseline.position}},
    scale=[0.3, 0.3, 0.3],
)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{mesh_baseline.path}}, schema_name=api)

# -- MeshB (simplify target) ------------------------------------------------
create_prim(
    prim_path={{mesh_simplify_target.path}},
    prim_type="Sphere",
    position={{mesh_simplify_target.position}},
)
set_attribute(prim_path={{mesh_simplify_target.path}}, attr_name="radius", value=0.2)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{mesh_simplify_target.path}}, schema_name=api)

# -- MeshC (repair target, degenerate) --------------------------------------
create_prim(
    prim_path={{mesh_repair_target.path}},
    prim_type="Cube",
    position={{mesh_repair_target.position}},
    scale=[0.25, 0.25, 0.001],
)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{mesh_repair_target.path}}, schema_name=api)
set_attribute(prim_path={{mesh_repair_target.path}}, attr_name="xformOp:scale", value=[0.25, 0.25, 0.0005])

check_collision_mesh(prim_path={{mesh_baseline.path}})
compute_convex_hull(
    prim_path={{mesh_baseline.path}},
    export_hull_path={{mesh_baseline.hull_export_path}},
)
compute_volume(prim_path={{mesh_baseline.path}})
compute_surface_area(prim_path={{mesh_baseline.path}})
simplify_collision(
    prim_path={{mesh_simplify_target.path}},
    approximation="convexDecomposition",
)
optimize_collision(
    prim_path={{mesh_simplify_target.path}},
    approximation="boundingSphere",
)
check_collision_mesh(prim_path={{mesh_repair_target.path}})
fix_collision_mesh(
    prim_path={{mesh_repair_target.path}},
    target_triangles=500,
)
check_collision_mesh(prim_path={{mesh_repair_target.path}})
visualize_collision_mesh(prim_path={{mesh_baseline.path}})
